hero.title: An online studio built for HOI4 creation and collaboration
hero.subtitle: Centered around focus trees, localization, docs and team workflows, this studio turns scattered HOI4 tooling into one cohesive workspace experience.

side.title: Not a generic admin panel, but a workstation for creation workflows
side.description: The homepage follows the Team APE:RIP portal style, while the studio area carries the dual-theme console language so the landing page and workspace share one visual DNA.

cardOne.title: Dual-theme workspace
cardOne.description: A dark neon-purple mode and a sakura soft-pink mode, without relying on system auto theme.

cardTwo.title: Actually visible i18n
cardTwo.description: Chinese and English content is wired into next-intl instead of only existing as placeholder message files.

plugin.title: A modular studio foundation
plugin.description: Built around resources, projects, organizations and realtime collaboration instead of being just another one-off demo page.

localization.title: Truly visible multilingual support
localization.description: The homepage and the studio will both expose real Chinese/English switching instead of hiding i18n behind unused files.

collaboration.title: Realtime workflow first
collaboration.description: Both Focus Tree and Localization will keep evolving around presence, conflict messaging and collaborative status visibility.

capabilities.title: Key workspaces for HOI4 team collaboration
capabilities.description: This studio is not a low-end generic form site. It is designed around the actual production chain of HOI4 content creation.

focusTree.title: Focus Tree Studio
focusTree.description: A unified canvas workspace for focus nodes, links, dependencies and collaborative editing state.

localization.title: Localization Workspace
localization.description: A dedicated control center for keys, translations, missing entries, import/export and collaborative localization editing.

docs.title: Docs & Planning
docs.description: A document space for planning, specs, dev logs and future Markdown / Diagram collaboration.

architecture.title: Build the long-term structure first, then keep expanding capabilities
architecture.description: This version is not just about polishing pages. It is about establishing the visual system, theme system, multilingual layer and workspace shell of Team APE:RIP Online Studio.

stack.title: Stable full-stack foundation
stack.description: Next.js + NestJS + MySQL keeps the system scalable as the studio grows.

tenant.title: Clear organization and project hierarchy
tenant.description: The studio is built around Organization / Project / Resource so collaboration can keep growing without structural rewrites.

runtime.title: Consistent deployment and runtime conventions
runtime.description: Docker Compose and runtime/ directory rules stay aligned with the BaoTa Linux deployment model.

realtime.title: Prepared for stronger realtime collaboration
realtime.description: The current version already has first-pass presence and revision conflict handling, with room for deeper sync models later.

home.heroTitle: An online collaboration studio built for HOI4 modding teams
home.heroSubtitle: Designed for long-term scalability with real-time collaboration, focus tree design, localization management and organization-level resource workflows.

page.title: My Organizations
page.subtitle: Only the organizations you belong to are shown here, together with repository and project summaries.
page.scopeDescription: The Studio home only shows content from organizations you belong to. Project access continues from each organization.
page.emptyDescription: Create a new organization or wait for an invitation to join one.
page.sectionDescription: Open the workspaces that belong to your organizations from here.

statsHints.organizations: Organizations currently available to this account

organization.subtitle: View projects and core information for the current organization.
organization.accessDeniedDescription: This account does not belong to the organization, or the organization data is unavailable.
organization.projectsDescription: All project entries under the current organization.
organization.emptyProjects: There are no projects in this organization yet.
